data.title: HyOrc (HYOR) advances green methanol platform in Europe amid rising demand, supported by long-term customer offtake structures.
data.description: HyOrc, trading under the ticker symbol HYOR, is making progress in their green methanol platform amidst increasing demand and favorable economic conditions in European markets. The company has secured long-term customer agreements for the offtake of their products.

data.title: Paysafe partners with Pay.com, becomes recommended acquirer for card transactions for online merchants. Skrill, Neteller, PaysafeCard integrated.
data.description: In London, a significant partnership has been established between Paysafe (NYSE: PSFE), a prominent payments platform, and Pay.com, a leading payments orchestration platform. The strategic collaboration designates Paysafe as one of the preferred acquirers for card transactions for online merchants utilizing the Pay.com platform. This partnership includes integration of Paysafe’s Skrill and Neteller digital wallets, as well as its PaysafeCard eCash solution, along with various alternative payment methods (APMs). Paysafe's innovative payment solutions are being integrated into Pay.com’s platform to enhance payment options for online businesses and customers.

data.title: European enterprises are speeding up adoption of responsible AI with analytics and AI market growing, as per ISG.
data.description: The analytics and AI market in Europe is experiencing rapid growth, driven by advancements in modern data platforms, unified governance, and adaptive systems. According to ISG, these factors are reshaping AI strategies across the continent. The increasing adoption of analytics and AI technologies is reflected in significant numbers with market value soaring to (insert value) and showing no signs of slowing down. This trend underscores the importance of organizations leveraging these technologies to stay competitive in the evolving business landscape.

data.title: Digital pathology market valued at USD 2.01 billion in 2026, set to reach over USD 3.2 billion by 2031 with a 9.9% CAGR as AI adoption rises - Mordor Intelligence.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of January 16, 2026, the digital pathology market has reached a value of USD 2.01 billion. Based on data from Mordor Intelligence, it is expected to exceed USD 3.2 billion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 9.90% predicted for the forecast period spanning from 2026 to 2031. This market trend signifies substantial growth and potential opportunities within the industry.
